/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,custom_messages_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.cpython-310-aarch64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/custom_messages/custom_messages_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.cpython-310-aarch64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/custom_messages__rosidl_typesupport_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/custom_messages/_custom_messages_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/copperbottoms/code/Copperbottoms/ros_ws/build/custom_messages/rosidl_generator_py/custom_messages:/home/copperbottoms/code/Copperbottoms/ros_ws/build/custom_messages:/opt/ros/humble/lib: rosidl_generator_py/custom_messages/libcustom_messages__rosidl_generator_py.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libcustom_messages__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so libcustom_messages__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
